Welcome to Dragon Repeller. You must defeat the dragon that is preventing people from leaving the town. You are in the town square. Where do you want to go? Use the buttons above.

challengeFiles.name: styles
script

tests.text: Trebalo bi da imaš listu birača za #controls, #stats.
Vaš selektor za #controls, #stats mora da ima border od 1px solid #0a0a23.
Vaš selektor za #controls, #stats mora imati 5px unutrašnjeg prostora.

description: Korišćenjem liste birača (selector1, selector2) dajte njegove komponente za #controls i #stats border od 1px solid #0a0a23, boju teksta za #0a0a23, i 5px od padding.
